response.justification: While Bogdan has strong full-stack and systems engineering experience, he lacks demonstrable production-scale leadership in agentic AI systems, fintech infrastructure, or scaling engineering teams beyond 10 people — all hard requirements for this CTO role. His experience with AI agents is superficial (MCP code generators), and there is no evidence of designing multi-agent frameworks, real-time credit/risk systems, or governing hybrid engineering models in regulated environments.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering skills across multiple languages and systems
Proven experience building event-driven, scalable platforms (GISCollective, DLang services)
Active contributor to open-source tooling and developer education
concerns: No evidence of leading AI systems in fintech or regulated financial environments
Lacks documented experience scaling teams to 30+ or developing senior technical leadership layers
Agentic AI experience is limited to tooling support, not architecture or production deployment
